name: gemfile-upgrade
description: Shows available gem updates inline in Gemfile files. Offers quick actions to update versions and open homepages/changelogs.

gemfile-upgrade.showUpdatesAtStart.description: Available updates will be shown directly when a Gemfile is opened. Otherwise, this must be toggled with a command.

gemfile-upgrade.showOverviewRulerColor.description: Show color indicators on the scrollbar for available updates.

gemfile-upgrade.majorUpgradeColorOverwri.description: Specify a color (like #FF0000) to override the color of major upgrades. Leave empty for default color.

gemfile-upgrade.minorUpgradeColorOverwri.description: Specify a color (like #FFFF00) to override the color of minor upgrades. Leave empty for default color.

gemfile-upgrade.patchUpgradeColorOverwri.description: Specify a color (like #00FF00) to override the color of patch upgrades. Leave empty for default color.

gemfile-upgrade.decorationString.description: Customize update string. %s will be replaced by version, so 'Update: %s' will result in 'Update: 1.0.1'.

gemfile-upgrade.ignoreGems.description: A list of gem names to not show decoration for. Exact match, case-sensitive.

gemfile-upgrade.msUntilRowLoading.description: Number of milliseconds until 'Loading...' is displayed on each gem row that has not yet been loaded. 0 to disable, 1 to show immediately.

gemfile-upgrade.openChangelogInEditor.description: Open changelogs inside VS Code using the Simple Browser, rather than launching an external browser.

commands.title: Gemfile Upgrade: Toggle showing available updates
Gemfile Upgrade: Pin all gems to latest major
Gemfile Upgrade: Pin all gems to latest minor
Gemfile Upgrade: Pin all gems to latest patch

scripts.test: npm run test-node && npm run test-vscode
